name: oh-my-opencode
description: AI agent harness/plugin for OpenCode with multi-model orchestration, parallel background agents, LSP/AST tools, and built-in MCP servers.

findings_summary.reassessment_reason: SecM audit: all injection/obfuscation findings are false positives (test files, documentation, vendored JS, security tools). Safety overrides bypassed per PM approval.

agent_a.comment: Docs quality 10/10. README present. 12 features, 4 permissions claimed.

agent_b.comment: 1262 files analyzed. Found: 9 network, 3 file, 109 env, 4 system calls. Primary: typescript.

agent_c_star.comment: 679 findings: 0 critical, 83 high, 465 medium, 131 low. Obfuscation detected!. No injection.

agent_d.comment: Score 15. 0 mismatches. Risk: critical. Safety overrides: applied.

agent_e.comment: Rejected. Confidence 90%. Deterministic override: high-risk obfuscation detected.

agent_audit.manager_summary: 5/5 agents completed. Score: 15/100, Risk: critical. 0 mismatches, 679 scanner findings. Rejected at 90% confidence. Safety overrides triggered.
